title: Samui Island Discovery Map Tour
shortDesc: Rent a scooter or join a guided tour to explore hidden beaches, viewpoints, and local villages.
description: The best way to really discover Koh Samui is to explore it yourself — map in hand, with no set agenda. This self-guided or guided island discovery tour takes families to hidden beaches, local villages, jungle viewpoints, and roadside coconut farms that most tourists never find. Guided versions use a fun map-based treasure hunt format that kids love. Scooter hire or air-conditioned van options available.
priceNote: Self-guided free / Guided from 500 THB per family
openingHours: Anytime — start early to beat the heat
